retry_reason: Failure (-ENOMEM) is due to memory allocation failure, which may be transient. However, the function is not primarily a reference-count wrapper, so retry semantics are not directly relevant to refcount operations.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to replace the eviction fence in the manager and attach the new fence to all locked BOs. Reference-count operations (dma_fence_put, dma_fence_init) are incidental; the function performs allocation, initialization, pointer replacement, and iteration over many objects.
